role: Platform-specific credential storage and secure secret management infrastructure.
responsibility: Provides a unified credential storage system with platform-specific backends (e.g., macOS Keychain) and secure file-based fallback, enabling safe persistence and retrieval of API keys and secrets across different environments.

children.role: Infrastructure facade providing a platform-specific credential storage backend for secure secret persistence on macOS.
Infrastructure module providing secure credential storage with pluggable backends and file-based fallback safety.
